title: Write M33 plan doc — Copilot Service
goal: Author docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md using docs/plans/2026-04-15-team-x-phase-5-m32-task-planner.md as the structural template. Required sections: Overview, What ships (T1–TN bullet list), Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Task breakdown (per-task scope with file paths + test deltas), Acceptance criteria (ABI rebuild dance + atomic-commit cadence + Loki ledger commits). Scope per Phase 5 design §9: new system-copilot pseudo-employee (second `is_system=1` row, separate role card at role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md), periodic analyzer with LLM + RAG retriever (M29) + pause-aware provider router (M31), proactive nudges surfaced in Copilot Conversations thread as a new message kind or tagged message, copilot.* IPC + bus events (e.g. `copilot.nudge`, `copilot.analyzed`), orchestrator integration for scheduled/event-triggered runs. Invariants to preserve: pure-view renderer (#1), singleton orchestrator (#2), append-only events table (#6), zero phone-home (#7), bus-event-on-IPC-mutation (#11).
predecessor: M32-T10 shipped as part of M32 COMPLETE (2026-04-16)
acceptance: Mirrors the M32 plan doc structure (Overview + What ships + Invariants preserved + Success criteria + Task breakdown + Acceptance criteria)
Task breakdown enumerates T1–TN with per-task scope, file paths touched, unit/E2E test deltas, and commit-message templates
Documents ABI rebuild dance (Node via node-gyp + Electron via electron-rebuild) in the verification section
Updates Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 status from 📋 Planned → 🚧 In progress once T1 begins (this commit only writes the plan doc)
Atomic commit: `feat(m33): M33 T0 — plan doc`
Ledger commit: `chore(loki): M33 T0 — commit ledger (<sha>)`
